## Problem Statement
Describe the problem this feature would solve. What is the use case or pain point?

## Proposed Solution
How would you like this feature to work? Describe your ideal implementation.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you think about? Why are they less ideal?

## Additional Context
Any other context, examples, or references that would be helpful?
